## Type of change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Chore

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm tsc --noEmit`
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Preview URL reviewed and approved (release PRs: `develop` → `main`)
- [ ] Manually tested

## Checklist

- [ ] Documentation updated if needed
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data included
